name: RingCentral Glip Team Messaging API
what_it_does: RingCentral's integrated team messaging platform (formerly Glip, now RingCentral App) with REST API — enabling developers to build team collaboration integrations including messaging, file sharing, task management, video meetings, and calendar integration, with bots, webhooks, and app framework for building embedded apps within the RingCentral unified communications ecosystem.
use_cases: Building RingCentral bots via Glip/RingCentral API for automated team notifications
Sending team messages programmatically via RingCentral API for workflow automation
Creating tasks and managing work items via RingCentral Glip API for project tracking
Integrating business applications via RingCentral webhooks for event-driven notifications
Building embedded apps via RingCentral App Framework for UCaaS workflow integration
not_for: Teams not using RingCentral UCaaS (Glip is tightly coupled to RingCentral platform)
Standalone team messaging without telephony needs (use Slack for pure messaging)
Small businesses without RingCentral contracts (Glip is enterprise UCaaS pricing)
best_when: An enterprise already using RingCentral for phone/UCaaS wants to build bots, notifications, and integrations within the same platform — avoiding context-switching between telephony and messaging tools.
avoid_when: You need a standalone team messaging platform without telephony, or your team doesn't use RingCentral services.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow or client credentials for server apps. JWT auth flow for server applications. Access token in Authorization: Bearer header. Token endpoint: https://platform.ringcentral.com/restapi/oauth/token. Scopes: ReadMessages, EditMessages, ReadTeams, EditTeams, ReadContacts, etc. Refresh token with 7-day expiry (renewable). RingCentral App Sandbox environment for development. Webhook subscriptions: POST /restapi/v1.0/subscription.

pricing.free_tier_limits: RingCentral MVP Essential: free for small teams (limited); Glip now part of RingCentral plans
pricing.notes: Glip acquired by RingCentral 2015 for $26M. Belmont, CA. NYSE: RNG. $1.7B+ revenue. Renamed from 'Glip' to 'RingCentral App' in 2021. 400,000+ business customers. UCaaS: unified voice + video + messaging + contact center. Competes with Cisco Webex, Microsoft Teams for enterprise. Glip was originally standalone team messaging product (SF, 2012) before acquisition. RingCentral Video (formerly Glip Video). Sandbox environment available for dev/test. App Gallery: 300+ pre-built integrations. RingCentral for Microsoft Teams integration. HIPAA compliant with BAA available.

performance.rate_limits: 1,000 API requests per minute per app (with burst allowance)

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: OAuth2 with scopes. Sandbox environment. 1,000 req/min. HIPAA compliant. US public company (NYSE: RNG). Glip renamed to RingCentral App 2021. JWT flow for server apps. Webhook subscriptions.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Message reads idempotent by message ID. Team reads idempotent. Message sending: not idempotent — use deduplication logic if retrying. Webhook subscription creation idempotent by filter events.
known_agent_gotchas: Glip is now called RingCentral App — documentation may use both names interchangeably
OAuth2 JWT flow for server apps (no user interaction): use Authorization Code for user delegation
Sandbox vs Production: use platform.devtest.ringcentral.com for sandbox testing
Webhook subscriptions expire every 30 days — must renew with PUT /subscription/{id}
Rate limit: 1,000 req/min is per app registration, not per user
Message creation: use multipart for file attachments (not JSON)

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. OAuth2 with granular scopes. JWT for server apps. HIPAA compliant (BAA available). GDPR compliant. SOC2/ISO27001 certified. Enterprise UCaaS — messaging contains business communications. US data residency (with EU/CA options). 99.999% uptime SLA for enterprise plans. Webhook events for team collaboration data.
